title: Cobalt Client
description: Cobalt Client is a performance based and general quality of life modpack that works on any server.
body:
Ultra Performance & Quality of Life Modpack.
Includes:

{Performance Mods}
- BadOptimizations
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME)
- Cull Leaves
- Dynamic FPS
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Culling
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Indium
- Lithium
- Methane
- ModernFix
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Very Many Players 
- Iris Shaders
- Noisium
  
- {Quality of Life Mods}
- AppleSkin
- ArmourHUD
- Better Beds
- BetterF3 (Please Config this with F3+M in game to edit it)
- Capes (Allows to see Optifine Capes)
- Debugify
- FabricSkyboxes
- Full Brightness Toggle
- Jade
- Journeymap
- Just Enough Items
- Mod Menu
- No Fog
- No darkness effect
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- Zoomify
- 
{Shaders}
- BSL Shaders
- Complementary Shaders
- Continuity
- Insanity Shader
- Rethinking Voxels
  
{APIs}
- Architectury API
- Cloth Config API
- Collective
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- [EMF] Entity Model Features (Allows for animated texture packs)
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features (Allows for animated texture packs)

Alt Version Mods
Includes:
{Performance Mods}
- BadOptimizations
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME)
- Cull Leaves
- Dynamic FPS
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Culling
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Indium
- Lithium
- Methane
- ModernFix
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Very Many Players 
- Iris Shaders
- Noisium
  
{Quality of Life Mods}
- AppleSkin
- Better Beds
- Capes (Allows to see Optifine Capes)
- Debugify
- FabricSkyboxes
- Full Brightness Toggle
- Mod Menu
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- Zoomify

{Shaders}
- BSL Shaders
- Complementary Shaders
- Continuity
- Insanity Shader
- Rethinking Voxels
  
{APIs and Libraries}
- Architectury API
- Cloth Config API
- Collective
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- [EMF] Entity Model Features (Allows for animated texture packs)
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features (Allows for animated texture packs)
